description_long: This is a two-story brick house with a rectangular footprint, surrounded by a fenced yard that includes both paved and grassy areas. The front facade features a prominent entryway with double doors, flanked by two potted plants and topped with a small overhang. Large, evenly spaced windows are present on both floors, providing ample natural light to the interior. Attached to the left side of the house is a single-car garage with a flat, dark roof and matching brickwork. The backyard is spacious and grassy, enclosed by a light-colored fence for privacy. The overall design is clean and symmetrical, with modern touches and a focus on functional outdoor space.
description: A two-story brick house with a flat-roofed garage, large windows, and a fenced yard featuring both paved and grassy areas. The front entryway is prominent and flanked by potted plants.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway with double doors, potted plants, and the attached garage to the right.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the large grassy backyard, the garage on the left, and the symmetrical window arrangement.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the brick facade, flat-roofed garage, and the expanse of the backyard.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the paved area in front of the garage and the side entry to the house.
attribute_entryway_design: Central double doors with a small overhang, flanked by potted plants and stone accents.
